title: Add Primbon Jawa & Kalender Pasaran Jawa to learn
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Primbon Jawa & Kalender Pasaran Jawa](https://jawidigital.my.id) to learn
- Menampilkan Kalender Jawa modern, perhitungan Weton, ramalan Primbon, serta konversi Aksara Jawa.

Fixes #10487

gist.headline: Wisdom of the Weton
gist.blurb: The hive is getting mystical! A new community app brings the Javanese calendar, Weton calculations, and Primbon divination to our growing greenhouse.
gist.summary: Added 'Primbon Jawa & Kalender Pasaran Jawa' to the community showcase, featuring modern Javanese calendar tracking, Weton calculations, and script conversion.
gist.impact: Users can now explore traditional Javanese divination and calendar systems built by the community directly from the apps showcase.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee exploring traditional Javanese culture. The bee looking at a glowing ancient scroll or calendar with mystical script, surrounded by glowing code-plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot looking at a glowing ancient scroll displaying a mystical calendar and Javanese script. The scroll rests on a wooden desk surrounded by glowing lime green (#ecf874) code-plants in terracotta pots. Soft pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
